objective: Review the code implementation of the fix for FORGE-BUG-007 to ensure the --count flag is respected when combined with --formal.
findings: Confirmed hello.py modification removes the 'if formal' branch bypass.
Verified greeting formatting correctly uses a dynamic ternary conditional based on the --formal flag.
Verified the standard iteration loop correctly repeats the output for both formal and casual paths.
Verified shouting option (--shout) is applied correctly before looping is done.
Manual execution confirmed correct output for combination --formal --count 3.
All function signature type hints are valid and conform to Python/Click conventions.
key_changes: Removed the 'if formal' branch in hello.py to allow loop execution.
Introduced inline conditional for greeting formatting.
Corrected looping to execute for both casual and formal formats.
